description_long: This jewelry object consists of two concentric circular rings suspended by thin cords or wires, creating a floating, modern appearance. The rings are smooth and uniform in thickness, with the inner ring slightly smaller and nested within the outer ring. The design is highly geometric and symmetrical, emphasizing clean lines and negative space. The surface appears to be metallic, likely brushed aluminum or stainless steel, giving it a sleek, contemporary finish. There are no visible gemstones, engravings, or additional decorative elements, reinforcing its minimalist aesthetic. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight and designed to hang, possibly as a pendant.
description: A minimalist, geometric pendant featuring two concentric metallic rings suspended by thin cords. The design is sleek, modern, and free of ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing both concentric rings clearly, with suspension cords visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin, flat profile of the rings and the alignment of the suspension cord.
description_view_2: Front view identical to view 0, displaying the full circular geometry and suspension.
description_view_3: Side view identical to view 1, highlighting the slimness and uniform thickness of the rings.
